name: io.github.dcadolph/vamoose
description: Calendar workflow engine for time off, approvals, and quick actions over Microsoft Graph, Google Calendar, Apple iCloud, or any CalDAV host.

packageArguments.description: Serve vamoose over the Model Context Protocol on stdio.

environmentVariables.name: VAMOOSE_PROVIDER
environmentVariables.description: Calendar provider: graph, google, icloud, or caldav.

environmentVariables.name: VAMOOSE_TIMEZONE
environmentVariables.description: IANA time zone for event times, such as America/Chicago.
